name: Wifite
description: Automated wireless attack tool wrapping aircrack-ng and others. Tool: https://github.com/derv82/wifite2. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #89 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Wifite output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Wifite output file to parse instead of running it live.
